task_completion.description: Open the raw plasmid sequence file in a bioinformatics tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a bioinformatics GUI (like UGENE) with 'raw_psynbio.fasta' loaded in the sequence viewer.

task_completion.description: Standardize the plasmid sequence so that position 1 is the EcoRI restriction site (GAATTC).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of locating the EcoRI site (GAATTC) and changing the sequence start position (e.g., a 'Change sequence start' dialog, or the sequence view showing the first nucleotides as GAATTC).

task_completion.description: Export the re-oriented sequence to standardized_plasmid.fasta.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog saving the sequence to '~/UGENE_Data/plasmid/results/standardized_plasmid.fasta', or a file manager/terminal showing this file has been created.

task_completion.description: Identify the longest ORF in the standardized construct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GUI should show an ORF finding tool or annotations panel displaying the longest ORF (spanning 1206 to 2105 on the Complement strand).

task_completion.description: Create a report with the required sequence and ORF details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing 'standardization_report.txt' containing the EcoRI start (2232), total length (2686), ORF start/end (1206-2105), strand (Complement), and first 10 amino acids (MSIQHFRVAL).

integrity.description: The agent used a bioinformatics GUI to perform the sequence manipulation and ORF finding.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a GUI application (like UGENE) for sequence analysis, rather than relying solely on terminal scripts or Python code to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The report file was genuinely created and edited.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor (like nano, gedit, or similar) being used to write the report, or terminal commands (like echo/cat) creating the file, rather than just displaying the final text in the agent's thought process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected total plasmid length is 2686 bp. In the raw sequence, the EcoRI start coordinate is at position 2232. After rotating the sequence so it starts precisely with GAATTC, the longest ORF is located on the Complement strand, spanning from start coordinate 1206 to end coordinate 2105. The first 10 translated amino acids of this ORF are 'MSIQHFRVAL'.
